landing.title: WhatsApp Autopilot par
landing.subtitle: Chhote business ke liye sasta WhatsApp automation
landing.feature_orders: WhatsApp par orders aur bookings manage karein
landing.feature_sheets: Google Sheet edit karein, bot turant update
landing.trust: Credit card nahi chahiye · Kabhi bhi cancel
landing.hero_subtitle: Customer ko auto-reply, order lena, pickup schedule. Hindi, English, Hinglish, Bengali, Urdu, Bhojpuri mein.
landing.no_card_cancel: Koi card nahi · Koi setup fee nahi · Kabhi bhi cancel
landing.reels_helper: Swipe / tap karke industry badlein. Har business ke liye wahi engine.
landing.without_whatly_desc: Raat 9 baje ke baad 30% msg miss. Customer chala jaata hai.
landing.with_whatly_desc: Bot 24×7 reply karta hai. Aap soyein, order aate rahein.
landing.uc_sub: Ek platform. Har business apni zaroorat use kare.
landing.feat_title: WhatsApp pe business chalane ke liye sab kuch
landing.feat_sub: No coding. No setup fee. No surprises.
landing.feat_reply_body: English, Hindi, Hinglish, Bengali, Urdu, Bhojpuri. Customer ne jo likha woh detect karta hai, usi bhasha mein reply.
landing.feat_sheets_body: Koi admin panel nahi. Sheet mein items ya FAQs add karein, bot har 15 min mein sync.
landing.feat_orders_body: Customer kahe '2 atta'. Bot parse karta hai, total banata hai, pickup time poochta hai. Cash ya UPI.
landing.feat_inbox_body: Saare customer msg phone par. Bot ko nahi pata to khud reply karein.
landing.feat_lang_body: Customer ne Hindi likhi? Hindi mein reply. Hinglish likhi? Hinglish. Automatic.
landing.feat_ai_body: ₹699/mo. Smart fallback jab FAQ match na ho. English replies customer ki bhasha mein auto.
landing.how_sub: Sign-up se pehle auto-reply tak. Koi tech skill nahi chahiye.
landing.step1_body: Phone number → WhatsApp se verify → 14-din trial. Koi card nahi.
landing.step2_body: Ek tap. Meta ka official signup. Data aapka rahega.
landing.step3_body: 12 ready templates: price, timing, location, menu wagaira. Reply edit karein, ho gaya.
landing.step4_body: Bot 24/7 customer ki bhasha mein reply karta hai. Sab inbox mein dikhta hai.
landing.price_sub: Jitna shop use kare utna do. Kabhi bhi cancel.
landing.final_title: Wahi reply baar baar likhna band karein
landing.final_sub: Ek baar setup karein. Chain se soyein. Customer ko turant reply — raat 2 baje bhi.

bento.hoverCta: Whatly seconds mein reply karta hai — koi customer miss nahi ↓

restaurants.fact: Customer usi se order karte hain jo pehle reply de — dinner rush mein late reply matlab gayi hui table.

gyms.title: Gyms & studios
gyms.fact: Zyadatar membership enquiry thandi pad jaati hai agar ek ghante mein reply na mile.

clinics.fact: Patient usi clinic ko book karte hain jo abhi reply de — baad mein call karne wale ko nahi.

salons.title: Salons & spas
salons.fact: Peak hours mein missed booking message matlab khaali chair jo bhar nahi sakti.

kirana.title: Kirana stores
kirana.fact: Customer usi se dobara order karte hain jo stock aur price sabse fast confirm kare.

boutiques.fact: Size poochhne wale customer pehli reply dene wali shop se khareedte hain.

testimonials.title: Owners kya kehte hain
testimonials.subtitle: Pure India ke kirana, cafe, salon aur clinic — Whatly se WhatsApp par zyada orders close karte hain.

items.quote: Pehle har order phone pe lena padta tha. Ab Whatly khud reply karta hai — main bas cooking pe focus karta hoon.
Membership queries, class timings, renewals — all handled on WhatsApp before I even reach the floor.
Hinglish orders bhi samajh leta hai. '2 atta 1 dal' type karo, total ready. Customers ko bahut pasand aaya.
My evening rush meant 30 missed messages. Now every client gets slots instantly and I book them right in chat.
Customers ping for kurti sizes and prices all day. Whatly shares the catalogue and books trials — I just stitch.
Appointment reminders alone cut my no-shows by half. Hours and FAQs are answered 24/7. Worth every rupee.

how.title: *Das minute* mein live
how.subtitle: Signup se pehli auto-reply tak. Na tech skills, na migration.

steps.title: Free signup karein
steps.body: Phone number → WhatsApp pe verify → 14-din trial. Koi card nahi.

steps.title: WhatsApp Business connect karein
steps.body: Meta ke official Embedded Signup se ek tap. Aapka data aapka rehta hai.

steps.title: Auto-replies chunein
steps.body: 12 ready templates — price, timings, menu, location. Answers edit karo, done.

steps.title: Customers ko turant jawab
steps.body: Bot 24/7 customer ki bhasha mein reply karta hai. Aap inbox dekhte rahein.

pricing.title: Aapki dukaan ke liye best plans
pricing.subtitle: Pure India ki dukaano ka bharosa. Jo aapki selling mein fit ho wo chunein — kabhi bhi upgrade karein.

faq.title: Common *sawaal*
faq.subtitle: Switch karne se pehle owners yahi poochhte hain. Phir bhi confusion? Bas message karein.

items.q: Kya mere customers ko pata chalega ki ye bot hai?
items.a: Unhe unki bhasha mein turant, sahi jawab milte hain. Zyadatar samajhte hain ki aap fast type kar rahe ho. Full transparency chahiye to reply pe 🤖 laga sakte ho.

items.q: Kya mujhe special WhatsApp number chahiye?
items.a: Haan — ek WhatsApp Business number (free, WhatsApp Business app se). Hum Meta ke official integration se connect karte hain.

items.q: Agar customer kuch aisa poochhe jo mere FAQs mein nahi hai?
items.a: Wo message aapke inbox mein 'Needs reply' ke saath aata hai. Aap khud reply karein, ya smart fallback ke liye AI add-on (₹699/mo) on karein.
English, Hindi (Devanagari), Hinglish, Bengali, Urdu, Bhojpuri. Bot detect karta hai customer ne kya likha aur usi bhasha mein reply karta hai.

items.q: Naye items / FAQs kaise add karun?
items.a: Dashboard mein directly edit karein, ya apni Google Sheet edit karein — bot har 15 min mein auto-sync karta hai. Zyadatar owners Sheet prefer karte hain.

items.q: Koi setup fee ya commitment hai?
items.a: Koi setup fee nahi. Koi commitment nahi. 14-din free trial. Trial ke liye card zaroori nahi.

footer.tagline: Ambitious Indian dukaano ke liye WhatsApp automation — chhe languages mein auto-reply, orders aur bookings.

restaurant.blurb: Aapke busy hours ka matlab missed orders nahi hona chahiye. Whatly menu bhejta hai, order leta hai, total karta hai aur pickup time lock karta hai — sab WhatsApp mein, jab aap cooking karte ho.
points: Aaj ka menu & live prices auto-bheje
Chat mein orders lekar total kare
Pickup time + payment method confirm kare
Bhookhe customer ko kabhi ignore na kare
chat: 🍽️ Butter Naan ₹40 · Paneer Tikka ₹220 · Dal Makhani ₹180. Order karein?
📝 ₹300 · Ready in 25 min. Pay on pickup?
✅ Order #R210 confirmed! See you at 7 PM.

kirana.blurb: Customers jaise bolte hain waise type karte hain. Whatly bikhri Hindi & Hinglish list padhta hai, stock check karta hai, basket total karta hai aur cash-on-delivery ke liye queue karta hai — na app, na forms.
points: Stock check kare aur live price bataye
chat: 📝 Order ₹680 · Pickup by 5 PM. Reply YES to confirm.

salon.blurb: Haircut ke beech phone uthana band karein. Whatly khaali slots dikhata hai, appointment book karta hai aur reminder bhejta hai — chair bhari rahe aur no-shows ghatein.
chat: Kal khaali: 11 AM, 2 PM, 5 PM. Kaunsa karein?
✅ Booked — Haircut, kal 2 PM. Reminder bhej denge 🔔

clinic.blurb: Patients har time wahi cheezein poochhte hain. Whatly timings aur FAQs turant batata hai, OPD slots book karta hai aur urgent cases flag karta hai — aapka front desk relax.
points: Urgent messages staff ke liye flag kare
chat: Aaj OPD 4–8 PM. Appointment book karein?
Clinic aaj khulega? Dr. Mehta available?
Namaste! 🩺 Khula hai 10–7. Dr. Mehta ka 4:30 PM slot free hai.
